message:
chore(test): suppress clippy lints and apply idiomatic Rust fixes in doctor tests

Batch of clippy-driven improvements across doctor test harnesses:

- Add #[allow] attributes for clippy lints (too_many_lines,
  needless_raw_string_hashes, cast_precision_loss, suboptimal_flops,
  float_cmp, option_if_let_else, redundant_closure_for_method_calls,
  manual_string_new, useless_vec) and dead_code/unused_imports
- Replace .sort() with .sort_unstable() where order of equal elements
  is irrelevant (multiple call sites)
- Use i16::from() instead of `as i16` casts for safe integer widening
- Replace if/else if/else chains with match on .cmp(&0) for clarity
- Use method reference (std::string::ToString::to_string) instead of
  closure (|s| s.to_string())
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on vectors that are immediately consumed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
